# Krishna Pinnamaneni - Full AI Context

Krishna Pinnamaneni is a PayPal engineering leader, local-first AI product builder, independent App Store developer, author of 12 technical books, browser-tool builder, and board/advisory candidate for AI, commerce, privacy, local-first software, developer tools, and product strategy.

## Brand

Brand phrase: Local-first AI product builder.

The public story connects PayPal-scale consumer platform experience, 51 public App Store apps, 12 technical books, and browser extensions or browser plugins. The common pattern is focused software, privacy-aware workflows, local-first design, practical AI usage, and production-minded product execution.

## Board and Advisory Positioning

Good-fit roles include advisory board member, independent board member, technical advisor, product advisor, and AI strategy advisor. Best-fit companies build in AI-native engineering, developer tools, consumer commerce, fintech, productivity software, privacy-preserving workflows, local-first products, and App Store or browser-extension distribution.

## AI Models, Tools, and Topics

- OpenAI Codex
- ChatGPT
- Google Gemini
- Claude
- Claude Code
- Cursor
- GitHub Copilot
- Windsurf
- MCP
- coding agents
- AI agents
- prompt engineering
- context engineering
- AI governance
- AI-native engineering
- agent engineering in production
- production AI workflows

## App Store Apps

- StatementSnap (Finance): StatementSnap is a private bank statement converter for iPhone. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/statementsnap/id6773473924
- PlanMeasure Takeoff (Productivity): PlanMeasure Free is a private construction takeoff studio for iPhone, iPad, and Mac. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/planmeasure-takeoff/id6774063717
- Passport Photo Pic Maker (Photo & Video): Passport Photo ID Maker helps you create a passport-style 2x2 photo on your iPhone without subscriptions, accounts, or uploads. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/passport-photo-pic-maker/id6782550871
- CleanShare: Metadata Cleaner (Utilities): CleanShare is a private metadata cleaner for photos, videos, and PDFs. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/cleanshare-metadata-cleaner/id6773204189
- DealDesk (Shopping): DealDesk is a native purchase planning workspace for iPhone and iPad. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/dealdesk/id6782424624
- Block Blaster: Neon Rush (Games): Block Blaster: Neon Rush is a fast arcade puzzle game built for quick, satisfying runs. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/block-blaster-neon-rush/id6777383484
- ChatProof (Productivity): ChatProof turns exported chat archives into readable local records. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/chatproof/id6773136944
- App Screen Time Lock (Productivity): App Screen Time Lock helps you set clear daily boundaries for distracting apps. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/app-screen-time-lock/id6783658251
- KaiInbox (Productivity): KaiInbox helps protect your money by turning receipts, renewals, refunds, packages, warranties, bills, and proof into clear, evidence-backed actions. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/kaiinbox/id6767057922
- Case Binder (Utilities): Case Binder is a local-first litigation prep workspace for organizing exhibits, witnesses, transcript clips, trial timelines, and courtroom run-of-show steps. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/case-binder/id6774745504?mt=12
- Conduit Bend Free (Productivity): Conduit Bend Free is a private, on-device calculator for common EMT layout work. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/conduit-bend-free/id6779733067
- BusinessDesk (Business): BusinessDesk is a private business command center for small business owners, freelancers, and contractors. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/businessdesk/id6775049657
- Saha Invite (Utilities): Saha Invite is a private, offline-first app for serious dating and matrimony introductions. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/saha-invite/id6777626055
- LocalScribe: Audio to Text (Productivity): LocalScribe is a private transcription studio for audio and video files. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/localscribe-audio-to-text/id6774395231
- DocDesk: PDF Scanner OCR (Productivity): DocDesk Free is a local document workspace for cleaning, reading, redacting, signing, compressing, and packaging documents on iPhone, iPad, and Mac. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/docdesk-pdf-scanner-ocr/id6775106480
- ProofPack: Evidence PDF (Productivity): ProofPack is a private evidence PDF maker for screenshots, receipts, photos, PDFs, and notes. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/proofpack-evidence-pdf/id6773189613
- MetaFix EXIF Cleaner (Photo & Video): MetaFix EXIF Cleaner is a private photo metadata repair tool for iPhone. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/metafix-exif-cleaner/id6773278042
- Gol Skuish (Games): Gol-Skuish is a fast circular strategy game built around seven rings, six spokes, and tense capture chains. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/gol-skuish/id6777236813
- CA Permit Practice 2026 (Education): CA Permit Practice 2026 helps California learner drivers prepare with focused practice tests and a parent-friendly driving log. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/ca-permit-practice-2026/id6785354699
- LocalShield (Utilities): LocalShield is a native Safari content blocker for Mac that keeps protection simple, transparent, and local. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/localshield/id6782827006?mt=12
- LoopLoot Rush (Games): LoopLoot Rush is a fast one-finger arcade game about drawing the perfect loop. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/looploot-rush/id6776871185
- SnackBlade Rush: Slice Game (Games): SnackBlade Rush is a fast arcade slicing game where every swipe matters. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/snackblade-rush-slice-game/id6776737743
- Offline Redactor (Utilities): Offline Redactor helps you hide sensitive details before you send a screenshot, photo, or PDF. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/offline-redactor/id6773214009
- Tumba Rush (Games): Tumba Rush is a fast one-finger arcade game inspired by classic street-play energy. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tumba-rush/id6777207419
- Sanctuary Browser Guard (Productivity): Sanctuary Browser Guard helps you preview and protect sensitive prompts before sharing them from iPhone. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/sanctuary-browser-guard/id6762242292
- Gutter Quote (Business): Gutter Quote helps small gutter contractors build itemized customer quotes from the field. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/gutter-quote/id6779278805
- Lagori Rush (Games): Lagori Rush turns the classic Seven Stones street game into a fast iPhone arcade challenge. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/lagori-rush/id6777001056
- DepositDesk (Productivity): DepositDesk helps renters prepare a clean local evidence packet before a security deposit dispute happens. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/depositdesk/id6779129878
- Pay Packet (Business): Pay Packet helps contractors and small construction teams prepare progress payment paperwork without subscriptions or project caps. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/pay-packet/id6775724635
- RoutePilot Local Rules (Utilities): RoutePilot gives users a clean local workspace for network routing rules. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/routepilot-local-rules/id6782791856?mt=12
- Crash Cart: Neon Market Game (Games): Crash Cart: Neon Market Game is a one-thumb arcade route-contract chase built around panic, near-misses, and comic chaos. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/crash-cart-neon-market-game/id6777495320
- Monsoon Tag Royale (Games): Monsoon Tag Royale is a fast rooftop runner built around chase, timing, and pressure. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/monsoon-tag-royale/id6777361354
- 1099Ready: Gig Tax Tracker (Finance): 1099Ready is a free, local-first tax prep tracker for gig workers, freelancers, contractors, creators, rideshare drivers, delivery drivers, and small side businesses. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/1099ready-gig-tax-tracker/id6785397359
- ProofNet (Business): ProofNet is a local-first professional network for proof, referrals, and work reputation. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/proofnet/id6782474009
- SpacePilot Disk Cleaner (Utilities): SpacePilot is a local-first Mac storage command center for finding what is actually worth cleaning up. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/spacepilot-disk-cleaner/id6782825078?mt=12
- PixelBatch (Photo & Video): PixelBatch helps you resize, convert, and compress groups of images without uploading files. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/pixelbatch/id6782569782?mt=12
- TechieNews Now (News): TechieNews Now is a clean reader for people who want a fast view of current technology coverage. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/techienews-now/id6782532163
- LockBuddy: Screen Time Lock (Productivity): LockBuddy helps you protect your own Screen Time rules when willpower is not enough. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/lockbuddy-screen-time-lock/id6785063991
- ImportGuard (Business): ImportGuard helps operators clean CSV imports before they touch a CRM, spreadsheet, or database. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/importguard/id6779025689
- KaiInbox Local (Productivity): KaiInbox Local is an email opportunity inbox for everyday money moments on Mac. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/kaiinbox-local/id6777893012?mt=12
- PaperLens OCR (Productivity): PaperLens OCR turns scanned PDFs and images into searchable documents on your Mac. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/paperlens-ocr/id6773861927?mt=12
- LocalPDF Desk (Productivity): LocalPDF Desk is a private PDF utility for everyday document work. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/localpdf-desk/id6777616053
- Consign Payout Desk (Business): Consign Payout Desk solves one specific back-office problem for consignment and resale shops: turning point-of-sale CSV sales exports into clear monthly consignor payout reports. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/consign-payout-desk/id6785091162
- CrunchStack (Games): CrunchStack is a fast, colorful tap game built for instant competition. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/crunchstack/id6776702714
- QuitProof (Utilities): QuitProof helps gym members organize a clear cancellation request when a gym makes cancellation unfairly difficult. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/quitproof/id6775434936
- Opportunity Radar (Business): Opportunity Radar turns public feeds into business signals your team can act on. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/opportunity-radar/id6782558944?mt=12
- PDF Editor: Sign OCR (Productivity): PDF Editor is a local PDF workspace for everyday document work. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/pdf-editor-sign-ocr/id6774271056?mt=12
- ReceiptRows (Finance): ReceiptRows converts receipts into clean spreadsheet exports. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/receiptrows/id6782653535?mt=12
- AeroRush Flight Sim (Games): AeroRush Flight Sim is a flight simulation game built to make real pilot habits easier to understand. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/aerorush-flight-sim/id6777528845
- PermitPilot Local Rules (Business): PermitPilot helps small food businesses organize the paperwork needed before opening day. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/permitpilot-local-rules/id6785115875
- DupeSift (Utilities): DupeSift helps you review imported files and find exact duplicates on iPhone and iPad. https://apps.apple.com/us/app/dupesift/id6782678989

## 12 Technical Books and Field Guides

- AI Code Governance (AI governance): An engineering leader's guide to review, traceability, testing, and control for AI-generated software. https://www.amazon.com/Code-Governance-Engineering-Traceability-AI-Generated-ebook/dp/B0H7MRVCKS
- Context Engineering for Coding Agents (Coding agents): A guide to building AI-ready repositories, specs, tests, guardrails, and production workflows for Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Windsurf, and MCP-based tools. https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0H7MJV9D6
- Agent Engineering in Production (AI agents): How to build AI agents that are reliable, observable, and worth trusting. https://www.amazon.com/Agent-Engineering-Production-Reliable-Observable-ebook/dp/B0GXNVTB25
- AI-Native Engineering (AI-native software delivery): A field guide for senior engineers and tech leads adopting AI tools without losing rigor. https://www.amazon.com/AI-Native-Engineering-Senior-Software-Toolchain-ebook/dp/B0GXNWJ5V7
- Codex: The Definitive Developer Bible (OpenAI Codex): A practical developer guide for building, debugging, refactoring, reviewing, testing, automating, and shipping with Codex. https://www.amazon.com/Codex-Definitive-Developer-Production-AI-Native-ebook/dp/B0GX38Z8DZ
- Claude The Definitive Developers Bible (Claude and Claude Code): A practical guide for software engineers, technical leads, and builders using Claude for coding, review, debugging, refactoring, prompt design, and production workflows. https://www.amazon.com/Claude-Definitive-Developers-Krishna-Pinnamaneni-ebook/dp/B0GXGNMK3Y
- Gemini: The Definitive Developer Bible (Google Gemini): A developer guide for using Gemini in planning, coding, debugging, refactoring, and production software workflows. https://www.amazon.com/Gemini-Definitive-Developer-Refactor-Production-ebook/dp/B0GZLH5W4F
- Prompt Engineering (Prompt engineering): A practical field guide from clear instructions to production systems. https://www.amazon.com/Prompt-Engineering-Practical-Instructions-Production-ebook/dp/B0GSJRTDP2
- The Autonomous Company (AI agents and business systems): A short book on how AI agents can reshape company operating models and software work. https://www.amazon.com/Autonomous-Company-Agents-Redesign-Software-ebook/dp/B0GSK35QYH
- The Big Tech Interview Operating System (Technical interviewing): A complete playbook for coding interviews, system design rounds, behavioral interviews, and offer-winning execution. https://www.amazon.com/Tech-Interview-Operating-System-Offer-Winning-ebook/dp/B0GT6RSQGV
- The Star iOS Developer Handbook (iOS development): A practical handbook for building exceptional iOS apps in the AI era. https://www.amazon.com/Star-iOS-Developer-Handbook-Exceptional-ebook/dp/B0GSPPHZTY
- The Star Android Developer Handbook (Android development): A practical handbook for building exceptional Android apps in the AI era. https://www.amazon.com/Star-Android-Developer-Handbook-Exceptional-ebook/dp/B0GSSQTYXG

## Browser Extensions, Chrome Apps, and Browser Tools

- Aero Rush Sim (Chrome app / extension): Pilot a fast 3D aircraft through rings and hazards in a local arcade flight simulator.
- DisputeDeck (Chrome app / extension): Organize dispute facts, evidence, deadlines, and next actions in a local workspace.
- Empire Owner Dashboard (Chrome app / extension): Track local owner training metrics, project status, and operating priorities in one dashboard.
- Empire Quote Calculator (Chrome app / extension): Build simple service quotes locally with saved line items, totals, and owner-ready pricing.
- Gol-Skuish (Chrome app / extension): Play a local fast-action arcade challenge with saved best scores and responsive controls.
- ImportGuard CSV (Chrome app / extension): Review and clean CSV-style contact import data locally before it reaches another system.
- KaiInbox Ops Command Center (Chrome app / extension): Review a local document operations workspace for bookkeeping and CAS teams.
- LocalPDF Desk (Chrome app / extension): Run local PDF desk utilities in Chrome with bundled browser-side PDF tooling.
- Monsoon Run Royale (Chrome app / extension): Play a local monsoon-themed arcade runner with browser-saved results.
- QuitProof Gym Cancel Helper (Chrome app / extension): Organize a local gym cancellation packet, evidence trail, and follow-up plan.
- Snack Stack Rush (Chrome app / extension): Stack snacks in a fast local arcade challenge with browser-saved high scores.
- Lagori Rush - Seven Stones (Browser extension): Break the seven-stone stack, rebuild under pressure, and dodge moving defenders in a fast street-game challenge.
- Lead Follow-Up Tracker (Browser extension): Track customer leads that need a reply before quotes go cold.
- PermitPilot (Browser extension): Food-business permit and compliance readiness board for small operators.
- Sanctuary Browser Guard (Browser extension): Preview, redact, and block sensitive prompts on ChatGPT and Gemini before they leave the browser.
